next }\n              found { print }\n            ' CHANGELOG.md)\n\n            if [ -z \"$NOTES\" ]; then\n              NOTES=\"Release ${TAG}\"\n            fi\n\n            # Skip if release already exists\n            if gh release view \"${TAG}\" --repo jedarden/miroir >/dev/null 2>&1; then\n              echo \"Release ${TAG} already exists, skipping.\"\n              exit 0\n            fi\n\n            # Pre-release detection\n            PRERELEASE_FLAG=\"\"\n            if echo \"$TAG\" | grep -qE '^v[0-9]+\\.[0-9]+\\.[0-9]+[-+]'; then\n              PRERELEASE_FLAG=\"--prerelease\"\n            fi\n\n            # Build binaries for release assets\n            apk add --no-cache musl-dev gcc 2>/dev/null || true\n            curl --proto '=https' --tlsv1.2 -sSf https://sh.rustup.rs | sh -s -- -y\n            . \"$HOME/.cargo/env\"\n            rustup target add x86_64-unknown-linux-musl\n            cargo build --release --target x86_64-unknown-linux-musl -p miroir-proxy -p miroir-ctl\n\n            strip -s target/x86_64-unknown-linux-musl/release/miroir-proxy\n            strip -s target/x86_64-unknown-linux-musl/release/miroir-ctl\n\n            cp target/x86_64-unknown-linux-musl/release/miroir-proxy miroir-proxy-linux-amd64\n            cp target/x86_64-unknown-linux-musl/release/miroir-ctl miroir-ctl-linux-amd64\n            sha256sum miroir-proxy-linux-amd64 > miroir-proxy-linux-amd64.sha256\n            sha256sum miroir-ctl-linux-amd64 > miroir-ctl-linux-amd64.sha256\n\n            gh release create \"${TAG}\" \\\n              --repo jedarden/miroir \\\n              --title \"miroir ${TAG}\" \\\n              --notes \"${NOTES}\" \\\n              ${PRERELEASE_FLAG} \\\n              --target \"$TAG\" \\\n              miroir-proxy-linux-amd64 \\\n              miroir-proxy-linux-amd64.sha256 \\\n              miroir-ctl-linux-amd64 \\\n              miroir-ctl-linux-amd64.sha256\n\n            echo \"Release ${TAG} created successfully.\"\n        env:\n          - name: GH_TOKEN\n            valueFrom:\n              secretKeyRef:\n                name: github-token\n                key: token\n        resources:\n          requests:\n            cpu: 2000m\n            memory: 4Gi\n          limits:\n            cpu: 4000m\n            memory: 8Gi\n","numLines":270,"startLine":1,"totalLines":270}}}

When aggregate workload exceeds this envelope, scale **horizontally** by adding pods, never vertically beyond the envelope. The request path is strictly stateless; background work partitions across pods via shard-partitioned ownership, leader election, or a shared job queue. [Open Problems](#15-open-problems)\n--\n/home/coding/miroir/docs/plan/plan.md-33-3. **Rendezvous hashing** — same algorithm Meilisearch Enterprise uses internally; minimal reshuffling on topology change, natural RF > 1 support.\n/home/coding/miroir/docs/plan/plan.md-34-4. **RF-configurable redundancy** — RF=1 for maximum capacity, RF=2 for one-node-loss tolerance, RF=3 for two-node-loss tolerance.\n/home/coding/miroir/docs/plan/plan.md-35-5. **Graceful degradation** — when a shard is unavailable, return partial results with a clear header rather than failing the entire request.\ndocs/plan/plan.md:36:6. **Static binaries, scratch images** — musl compilation + scratch Docker base for minimal attack surface and trivial deployment.\n/home/coding/miroir/docs/plan/plan.md-37-7. **GitOps first** — all deployment configuration committed to `jedarden/declarative-config`; ArgoCD drives all cluster changes.\n/home/coding/miroir/docs/plan/plan.md-38-8. **Fixed per-pod resource envelope** — each Miroir orchestrator pod fits within **2 vCPU / 3.75 GB RAM**. When aggregate workload exceeds this envelope, scale **horizontally** by adding pods, never vertically beyond the envelope. The request path is strictly stateless; background work partitions across pods via shard-partitioned ownership, leader election, or a shared job queue.
